overview.short: Gujrugarhi is a place of historical importance located in Patti Gujdu of Nainidanda region in Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India.
overview.description: Gujrugarhi is a place of historical importance located in Patti Gujdu of Nainidanda region in Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India. The whole complex of temple and historical caves is situated on a hilltop in Deeba range at an average altitude of 2400 metres (7880 ft).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Diba Danda
topPlaces.description: Deeba Danda is a peak in the Patti Khatli region of Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India. It is 2,670 metres (8,760 ft) high and is a part of the Diba Range, which forms the southern boundary of the Nayar Valley.

topPlaces.name: Dhumakot
topPlaces.description: Dhumakot is a tehsil or administrative division, located in the Pauri Garhwal district of the Indian state of Uttarakhand. It is bordered by the tehsils of Lansdowne, Kotdwar, Thalisain and Bironkhal.

topPlaces.name: Bironkhal
topPlaces.description: Bironkhal Tehsil is a administrative division located in the Pauri Garhwal district of the Indian state of Uttarakhand. It is one of the 14 tehsils in the district and is headquartered in the town of Syunsi.

topPlaces.name: Kalinka Temple
topPlaces.description: The hill temple of Kalinka is situated in Bironkhal block of Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand in northern India. The temple complex lies close to the border with the Almora district and is dedicated to Goddess Kali.

items.note: Deeba Danda is a peak in the Patti Khatli region of Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India. It is 2,670 metres (8,760 ft) high and is a part of the Diba Range, which forms the southern boundary of the Nayar Valley.

Dhumakot is a tehsil or administrative division, located in the Pauri Garhwal district of the Indian state of Uttarakhand. It is bordered by the tehsils of Lansdowne, Kotdwar, Thalisain and Bironkhal.

Bironkhal Tehsil is a administrative division located in the Pauri Garhwal district of the Indian state of Uttarakhand. It is one of the 14 tehsils in the district and is headquartered in the town of Syunsi.

The hill temple of Kalinka is situated in Bironkhal block of Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand in northern India. The temple complex lies close to the border with the Almora district and is dedicated to Goddess Kali.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gujrugarhi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gujrugarhi is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

The nearest airport is Pantnagar Airport (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Kathgodam (Nainital railhead) (72 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gujrugarhi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gujrugarhi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gujrugarhi?
faq.a: Stays in Gujrugarhi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gujrugarhi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Diba Danda, Dhumakot, Bironkhal, Kalinka Temple.
